$comment: Global economy constants from design doc §8. All first-pass values — tune in Phase 3 against pacing targets.

tools.$note: flint is knapped (no forge); each later tier also consumes an ingot batch (see recipes)

excavation.$note: guaranteed fragment per pity interval; drop rate = digCrew * digSpeed * strataRarity

tending.$note: burst values are a first guess — not in design doc, tune in Phase 1
